intro: Dodge the meme. Survive the chaos!
description:
Welcome to a place where reality breaks and memes take control.
BOMBARDINO CROCODILO vs TUNG TUNG SAHUR is a chaotic meme game where you play as BOMBARDINO CROCODILO and try to survive in a world full of absurd danger.
Your goal is simple — keep dodging and stay alive while TUNG TUNG SAHUR suddenly appears ahead, turning every moment into a test of reflexes and nerve.
A strange world.
Only BOMBARDINO CROCODILO can escape the chaos.
Nothing here plays fair — especially Tung.
